spec.description: dmgCtrl analytics — sessions, games, installs, base popularity, feature adoption

spec.rawSql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', time) AS day, COUNT(DISTINCT "sessionId") AS sessions
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', time)
ORDER BY day ASC

spec.title: Errors per session
spec.description: % of sessions in which each error was seen at least once

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'deck_import_failure' THEN "sessionId" END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "sessionId"), 0), 3) AS "Deck import failure",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'image_load_failed' THEN "sessionId" END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "sessionId"), 0), 3) AS "Image load failed",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'bases_load_failed' THEN "sessionId" END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "sessionId"), 0), 3) AS "Bases load failed",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'bases_load_stale' THEN "sessionId" END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "sessionId"), 0), 3) AS "Bases load stale",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'wake_lock_failed' THEN "sessionId" END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "sessionId"), 0), 3) AS "Wake lock failed"
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS games
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND event = 'game_ended'
  AND "durationSeconds" > 60
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', time)
ORDER BY day ASC

spec.title: Sessions by city
spec.description: Sessions per city plotted by approximate location (Cloudflare edge PoP coordinates)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT country, city, AVG(latitude) AS latitude, AVG(longitude) AS longitude, COUNT(DISTINCT "sessionId") AS sessions
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND city != 'unknown'
  AND latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY country, city
ORDER BY sessions DESC
LIMIT 100

spec.title: Base popularity
spec.description: Games played per base (game_ended, duration > 60s), selected time range

spec.rawSql:
SELECT CONCAT(e."baseKey", ' ', COALESCE(la.aspect, 'None')) AS label,
  COUNT(*) AS games,
  CASE COALESCE(la.aspect, 'None')
    WHEN 'Aggression' THEN '#c4162a'
    WHEN 'Command' THEN '#37872d'
    WHEN 'Vigilance' THEN '#1e6fa8'
    WHEN 'Cunning' THEN '#e0b400'
    ELSE '#9e9e9e'
  END AS color
FROM events e
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT ba."baseKey", ba.aspect
  FROM base_aspects ba
  INNER JOIN (SELECT MAX(time) AS max_time FROM base_aspects) lr ON ba.time = lr.max_time
) la ON e."baseKey" = la."baseKey"
WHERE e.env = 'production'
  AND e.event = 'game_ended'
  AND e."durationSeconds" > 60
  AND $__timeFilter(e.time)
GROUP BY e."baseKey", COALESCE(la.aspect, 'None')
ORDER BY games DESC
LIMIT 25

spec.title: Games per session
spec.description: Distribution of qualifying games (duration > 60s) completed per session

spec.rawSql:
SELECT CAST(game_count AS VARCHAR) AS "Games", COUNT(*) AS sessions
FROM (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS game_count
  FROM events
  WHERE env = 'production'
    AND event = 'game_ended'
    AND "durationSeconds" > 60
    AND $__timeFilter(time)
  GROUP BY "sessionId"
) sub
GROUP BY game_count
ORDER BY game_count

spec.title: App installs over time
spec.description: app_installed events per day, split by platform

spec.rawSql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', time) AS day,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN platform = 'ios' THEN 1 END) AS "iOS",
  COUNT(CASE WHEN platform = 'android' THEN 1 END) AS "Android"
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND event = 'app_installed'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', time)
ORDER BY day ASC

spec.title: Installs by platform
spec.description: Cumulative install count split by platform, selected time range

spec.rawSql:
SELECT platform, COUNT(*) AS installs
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND event = 'app_installed'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY platform
ORDER BY installs DESC

spec.title: Feature adoption
spec.description: % of qualifying sessions using each feature at least once

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'game_ended' AND "durationSeconds" > 60 AND hyperspace = true THEN "sessionId" END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'game_ended' AND "durationSeconds" > 60 THEN "sessionId" END), 0), 1) AS "Hyperspace",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'force_gained' THEN "sessionId" END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'game_ended' AND "durationSeconds" > 60 THEN "sessionId" END), 0), 1) AS "Force token",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'epic_action_used' THEN "sessionId" END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'game_ended' AND "durationSeconds" > 60 THEN "sessionId" END), 0), 1) AS "Epic action",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'undo_used' THEN "sessionId" END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event = 'game_ended' AND "durationSeconds" > 60 THEN "sessionId" END), 0), 1) AS "Undo"
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production' AND $__timeFilter(time)

spec.title: Sessions by play mode
spec.description: Breakdown of game sessions by play mode (Casual / Bo1 / Bo3)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT "playMode", COUNT(*) AS sessions
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND event = 'game_started'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY "playMode"
ORDER BY sessions DESC

spec.title: Bo1 match results
spec.description: Count of Bo1 match outcomes (won / lost / drawn)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT "matchResult", COUNT(*) AS matches
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND event = 'match_completed'
  AND "playMode" = 'bo1'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY "matchResult"
ORDER BY "matchResult"

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS tournaments
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND event = 'tournament_started'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', time)
ORDER BY day ASC

spec.title: Tournament round outcomes
spec.description: Count of tournament round results (won / lost / drawn)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT "result", COUNT(*) AS rounds
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND event = 'tournament_round_completed'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY "result"
ORDER BY "result"

spec.title: Tournament completion vs drop
spec.description: How tournaments end: completed (tournament_ended) vs dropped early (tournament_dropped)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT event AS outcome, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND event IN ('tournament_ended', 'tournament_dropped')
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY event
ORDER BY event

spec.title: Bo3 match results
spec.description: Count of Bo3 match outcomes (won / lost / drawn)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT "matchResult", COUNT(*) AS matches
FROM events
WHERE env = 'production'
  AND event = 'match_completed'
  AND "playMode" = 'bo3'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY "matchResult"
ORDER BY "matchResult"

spec.title: dmgCtrl Analytics
